top_signals.title: Transparency data: HM Treasury organisational charts
top_signals.summary: HM Treasury structure charts and organisational data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: China’s grip on lithium to hit 39% by 2030: WoodMac
top_signals.summary: Chinese firms are tightening control of global lithium assets with Africa emerging as the fastest-growing supply region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CISA to allow researchers to report vulnerabilities to exploited bugs catalog
top_signals.summary: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) announced the creation of a nomination form on Thursday that they said enables “researchers, vendors, and industry partners” to report bugs that need to be added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Fortescue begins construction on 690MW solar farm in Pilbara
top_signals.summary: The Turner River solar farm represents the final solar installation required to deliver the company’s Real Zero decarbonization plan.
